Common.tagline: Software for independent teachers to manage students, classes and payments.

Home.title: Organize students, classes and payments in one place.
Home.description: CTRL_Classes helps independent teachers run their routine with clearer scheduling and billing.
Home.sectionTitle: Everything you need to run your teaching business
Home.sectionDescription: Create student records, track classes, record attendance and keep monthly billing under control.

Auth.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is not available in this environment yet.
Auth.loginDescription: Sign in to keep up with students, classes and payments.
Auth.signupDescription: Create your account to start organizing your teaching routine.

AuthShell.title: Your teaching routine, in order.
AuthShell.description: Sign in to manage students, classes and payments in one place.

Onboarding.title: Complete your profile
Onboarding.description: Set your name, language, time zone and currency to get started.
Onboarding.asideHint: Fill the main details now so you do not need manual fixes later.
Onboarding.stepOne: Choose how your name appears in the app.
Onboarding.stepTwo: Set the default language, time zone and currency.
Onboarding.stepThree: Leave the account ready for students, classes and payments.
Onboarding.completed: These details are already filled in. You can update them anytime.

PrivateApp.title: Your daily operation starts here.
PrivateApp.description: See what needs attention today and move quickly between students, agenda and payments.

PrivateNav.appDescription: See today's numbers and what needs your attention now.
PrivateNav.studentsDescription: Manage each student's details, prices and current status.
PrivateNav.agendaDescription: Review the current period and act on the day's classes.
PrivateNav.schedulesDescription: Organize recurring time slots and keep an eye on upcoming classes.
PrivateNav.paymentsDescription: Generate charges and register money received for the month.
PrivateNav.settingsDescription: Adjust your account, integrations and subscription.
PrivateNav.onboardingDescription: Review your name, language, time zone and account preferences.

Students.title: Students
Students.description: Create, edit and track billing for each student.
Students.emptyDescription: Create your first student to start organizing classes, attendance and payments.
Students.formDescription: Fill in the student details, billing style and rule for missed classes without notice.
Students.billingDescription: Define how this student is billed and which values belong in your financial routine.
Students.preferencesDescription: Adjust billing behavior and keep useful notes for daily work.
Students.emailHint: Use the best contact for reminders, invites or follow-up.
Students.phoneHint: Optional, but useful to reschedule or confirm classes.
Students.statusHint: Control whether this student is active, paused or outside the current operation.
Students.currencyHint: Main billing currency for this student.
Students.billingTypeHint: Choose between a fixed monthly fee or a per-class price.
Students.monthlyAmountHint: Fill this when billing is based on a monthly fee.
Students.classRateHint: Fill this when billing is based on each delivered class.
Students.billingDayHint: Used for monthly billing. Choose a day between 1 and 28.
Students.notesDescription: Capture preferences, context or important agreements.
Students.notesPlaceholder: Example: prefers online lessons, pays with Pix, sends absences on WhatsApp.
Students.chargeNoShowDescription: When enabled, missed classes without notice continue to be billed.
Students.overviewCreateState: As you fill the form, this summary helps you review the student before saving.
Students.overviewEditState: Use this summary to quickly confirm the impact of your edits.
Students.overviewMonthly: Recurring fixed billing, ideal for a predictable routine.
Students.overviewPerClass: Flexible billing for delivered or makeup classes.
Students.overviewChargeNoShowOn: Missed classes without notice are charged.
Students.overviewChargeNoShowOff: Missed classes without notice are not charged automatically.
Students.validationInvalid: Review the student details and try again.
Students.errorBillingDay: Choose a billing day between 1 and 28.
Students.errorClassRate: Enter a valid price per class.
Students.errorSave: We could not save this student right now.

Schedules.title: Recurring time slots
Schedules.description: Organize fixed time slots and monitor the next generated classes.
Schedules.emptyDescription: Create your first recurring time slot to fill the agenda ahead of time.
Schedules.formDescription: Choose the days, time and period when these classes should repeat.
Schedules.validationInvalid: Review the recurrence details and try again.
Schedules.errorTitle: Add a name for this recurrence.
Schedules.errorTimezone: Confirm the time zone for this recurrence.
Schedules.errorStartTime: Enter the time in the 08:00 format.
Schedules.errorDuration: Duration must stay between 15 and 600 minutes.
Schedules.errorEndDate: End date cannot be before the start date.
Schedules.errorSave: We could not save this recurrence right now.

Agenda.title: Agenda
Agenda.description: Filter the period, record attendance and adjust the day's classes.
Agenda.createManualClassDescription: Create a one-off class for makeups, extra sessions or one-time adjustments.
Agenda.emptyDescription: Adjust the date, the status or create a new recurrence to generate future classes.
Agenda.validationInvalid: Review the class details and try again.
Agenda.errorTitle: Add a name for this class.
Agenda.errorStartTime: Enter the time in the 08:00 format.
Agenda.errorDuration: Duration must stay between 15 and 600 minutes.
Agenda.errorCreate: We could not create this class right now.

Payments.title: Payments
Payments.description: See what is still unpaid and register payments for the month.
Payments.summaryDescription: See quickly what came in, what is still open and what already needs action.
Payments.listDescription: Use this list to track due dates and register payments without losing context.
Payments.emptyDescription: Generate the month charges or adjust the filter to view other statuses.

PartnerForm.preferencesDescription: Adjust language, currency and how you usually teach.
PartnerForm.validationInvalid: Review the account details and try again.
PartnerForm.errorDisplayName: Enter the name that should appear in the app.
PartnerForm.errorSave: We could not save these settings right now.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Update account details, preferences and subscription.
Settings.spaceDescription: Review subscription, readiness and preferences without leaving the main product flow.
Settings.billingRequired: Access is paused because the subscription is not active. Update it below to return to the app.
Settings.billingSuccess: Payment started successfully. As soon as it is confirmed, the subscription will appear here.
Settings.billingCanceled: The payment flow was interrupted. You can try again whenever you want.

Readiness.title: System setup
Readiness.description: Check whether the main connections and integrations are ready in this environment.
Readiness.environmentCoverageDescription: Shows how many essential setup points are already ready in this environment.
Readiness.databaseDescription: Checks whether the app can reach the database without exposing sensitive data.
Readiness.missingEmpty: No pending variables in this environment.
Readiness.missingDescription: Use this panel as support when validating the environment before opening real access.

Subscription.title: Subscription
Subscription.description: See your plan and manage the platform subscription.
Subscription.missingConfig: Billing is not ready in this environment yet.
Subscription.errorNotReady: Billing is not available in this environment yet.
Subscription.errorCustomerMissing: Your account is not ready to open the subscription area yet.
Subscription.errorCheckout: We could not open the payment flow right now.
Subscription.errorPortal: We could not open the subscription area right now.

Dashboard.title: {name} overview
Dashboard.description: See what needs attention today at a glance.
Dashboard.heroNowClass: Your next priority has already started: {title}.
Dashboard.heroTodayWithNext: You have {count} classes today. The next one starts in {time}.
Dashboard.heroPendingPayments: {count} payments are still waiting for confirmation today.
Dashboard.heroQuietDay: Quiet day. Good time to organize schedule, students and billing.
Dashboard.studentsDetail: Students currently being managed in billing and schedule.
Dashboard.todayClassesDetail: Classes scheduled for the current day.
Dashboard.pendingPaymentsDetail: Charges still open in the current month.
Dashboard.upcomingDescription: These are the next classes already sitting in your agenda.
Dashboard.pendingPaymentsEmpty: Everything is up to date for now.
Dashboard.timelineDescription: Now and the next few hours, in priority order.
Dashboard.timelineEmptyDescription: Use the lighter day to open the agenda and prepare the week ahead.
Dashboard.activityDescription: Confirmations, payments and updates that moved your day.
Dashboard.activityEmptyDescription: When students, classes or payments change, this feed will show it here.
Dashboard.onboardingDescription: Use this checklist to get the operation ready without losing momentum.
Dashboard.weekDescription: A quick read on the week without leaving the dashboard.
Dashboard.overviewAsideDescription: A quick account summary without stealing focus from today's work.
Dashboard.todayPanelDescription: Use this panel to understand the day and move quickly.
Dashboard.todayHasClasses: Your agenda already has classes scheduled for today.
Dashboard.todayNoClasses: Today is open. Good moment to adjust schedule and billing.
Dashboard.subscriptionMissingConfig: Stripe is not configured in this environment yet.
